name: mx-macro-data
tagline: ClawHub (67★): 基于东方财富数据库，支持自然语言查询全球宏观经济数据，涵盖国民经济核算、价格指数、货币金融、财政收支、对外贸易、就业民生、产业运行等多个领域，适配各类宏观经济研究、市场分析、政策解读等多元专业场景需求。返回结果包含数据说明及 csv 文件。Natu
verdict: The shipped code example is actually broken: it assigns the result to `result` but then references an undefined `r`, so running it as documented raises a NameError. On top of that there's no scope-exclusion language and no version tracking at all.

highlights.summary: The code example assigns the awaited call to `result` (line 199) but then references undefined `r` here, an internal inconsistency that would raise NameError if run as shown.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope language or pointer to better-suited skills appears anywhere in description or body.
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
